cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out where each gift ends up after all the swaps. So, there are five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a different colored present. Let me list their initial gifts first. Alice has a brown present. Bob has an orange ball. Claire has a green present. Dave has a blue present. Eve has a white present. Now, there are five swaps happening. Let me go through each swap step by step, keeping track of who has what after each exchange. First swap: Eve and Bob swap their gifts. Before this swap: Eve has white, Bob has orange. After swapping, Eve will have the orange ball and Bob will have the white present. Let me update their gifts. After first swap: Alice: brown
